_comment: R230: Vercel deployment preflight. See docs/HANDOFF-NEXT-STAGE.md §2. SSE maxDuration 60s caps the platform budget per request (60s Pro, 10s Hobby) — long 6-agent runs may be severed by the platform. The research engine keeps its session map in module-level state (src/lib/research/research-engine.ts), which is per-instance; cross-request session continuity is NOT guaranteed on serverless. Owner must verify post-deploy whether SSE survives across instances (see scripts/vercel-serverless-probe.js for a local dry-run).
